modelIdentification.name: SISO-STD-005-2023 - Link 11/11B Simulation FOM module
modelIdentification.purpose: Defines the Link 11/11B model in an HLA federation
modelIdentification.description: This module provides the full definition of the SISO-STD-005 Standard for Link 11/11B Simulation for implementation using HLA. Note that this Link 11/11B FOM module relies upon a parent FOM to provide suitable class definitions for radio transmitters and radio signals. Typically, it cannot be directly used within a federation. This module can be considered as a template for creating a concrete FOM module for inclusion in the parent FOM. See SISO-STD-005-2023 section 4.3 for more information. Note also that for HLA Evolved a pre-built RPR FOM 2.0 with Link 11/11B FOM modules can be downloaded from the SISO website.
modelIdentification.useHistory: Updated for integration with the RPR FOM 2.0.

poc.pocName: TADIL TALES Product Development Group and Product Support Group

reference.identification: SISO-STD-005-2023 Standard for Link 11/11B Simulation Version 1.0 15 June 2023
SISO-STD-001-2015 Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model Version 2.0 10 August 2015
SISO-STD-001.1-2015 Standard for Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model Version 2.0 10 August 2015
SISO-REF-010-2023 Reference for Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability Version 31 08 October 2022
Real-time Platform Reference Communication FOM Module

interactionClass.name: TDLBinaryRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Parent class for all TDL radio signals.

interactionClass.name: Link11RadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal common base class.

parameter.name: ParticipatingUnitNumber
parameter.semantics: The Participating Unit Source Number of the Link 11 unit in any mode of operation. For Interrogation Messages, the PU Number is the identification of the unit being polled. For all other Sub-Types, the PU Number reflects the originating Participating Unit

parameter.name: SequenceNumber
parameter.semantics: A counter that each simulated system increments for every Link11RadioSignal generated. This parameter starts at 0 for each transmission cycle (cycling of the Transmit State).

parameter.name: DataSignalingRate
parameter.semantics: The data signaling rate of the Link 11 transmission.

parameter.name: EncryptionFlag
parameter.semantics: Identifies if the Link 11 data is encrypted.

parameter.name: PerceivedTransmitTime
parameter.semantics: The simulation time at which the radio signal is transmitted. Optional for Fidelity Levels 0 and 1; default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

interactionClass.name: Link11NetTestRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from the DNCS, optionally containing a test pattern.

interactionClass.name: Link11RollCallRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from the NCS to interrogate a specific PU (when the MessageSubType is set to Interrogation) or containing one or more NCS data messages (when the MessageSubType is set to Data).

interactionClass.name: Link11PicketReplyRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from a (non-NCS) PU in reply to a roll-call interrogation, containing one or more PU data messages (when the MessageSubType is set to Data).

interactionClass.name: Link11ShortBroadcastRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from a PU without having been explicitly interrogated, containing one or more PU data messages (when the MessageSubType is set to Data). Used in Short Broadcast / Silence Mode of Operation.

interactionClass.name: Link11BroadcastRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from a PU without having been explicitly interrogated, containing one or more PU data messages (when the MessageSubType is set to Data). Used in Broadcast Mode of Operation.

interactionClass.name: Link11NetSyncRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 11 radio signal from a PU for the purpose of establishing a universal timing reference in all PUs. This signal does not contain data (i.e. the CLEWMessage or SLEWMessage array indicates 0 elements).

parameter.name: ReportingUnitNumber
parameter.semantics: The Reporting Unit Source Number of the Link 11B unit in any mode of operation.

parameter.name: SequenceNumber
parameter.semantics: A counter that each simulated system increments for every Link11BRadioSignal generated. This parameter starts at 0 for each transmission cycle (cycling of the Transmit State).

parameter.name: DataSignalingRate
parameter.semantics: The data signaling rate of the Link 11B transmission.

parameter.name: EncryptionFlag
parameter.semantics: Identifies if the Link 11B data is encrypted.

parameter.name: PerceivedTransmitTime
parameter.semantics: The simulation time at which the radio signal is transmitted. Optional for Fidelity Levels 0 and 1; default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

arrayData.name: Link11BMessageStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Array of Link 11B messages, encoded with the number of array elements (equals the number of 48-bit TDS words).

arrayData.name: Link11CLEWMessageStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Array of Link 11 messages in CLEW format, encoded with the number of array elements (equals the number of 48-bit TDS words).

arrayData.name: Link11SLEWMessageStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Array of Link 11 messages in SLEW format, encoded with the number of array elements (equals the number of 48-bit TDS words).

fixedRecordData.name: Link11BMessageStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 11B message consisting of six data groups and a check group of 8 bits each (the start group and the mark bits are not included). Padded with 8 bits, resulting in a total structure size of 64 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: Data group 1 to 6 (excluding each group's first mark bit from the original transmission frame).

field.name: Check
field.semantics: Check group (excluding the first mark bit from the original transmission frame).

fixedRecordData.name: Link11CLEWFrameStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 11 30-bit frame consisting of 24 bits of tactical information and 6 Hamming Error Detection And Correction (EDAC) bits. The EDAC field is padded to 8 bits.

field.name: EDAC
field.semantics: In total 8 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-5: Error Detection And Correction. Bits 6-7: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: Link11CLEWMessageStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 11 message in CLEW format, consisting of two 30-bit frames. Each frame is padded with 2 bits, resulting in a total structure size of 64 bits.

fixedRecordData.name: Link11SLEWMessageStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 11 message in SLEW format, consisting of two 24-bit TDS data blocks and 12 CRC error detection bits. The CRC field is padded with 4 bits, resulting in a total structure size of 64 bits.

field.name: CRC
field.semantics: In total 16 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-11: CRC error detection. Bits 12-15: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: NTPTimestampStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: 64-bit timestamp format according to RFC 5905. All bits set to one in both fields indicate a no statement/wildcard.

field.name: Seconds
field.semantics: Number of seconds since 0 h 1 January 1900 UTC.

field.name: Fraction
field.semantics: Fraction of a second, in 1/(2^32) resolution (232 picoseconds).

variantRecordData.name: Link11MessageVariantStruct
variantRecordData.semantics: Variant record for the different message formats in Link 11 signals.
